purpose: Record supporting South Africa operator/regulator route checks after Gold Circle manual records were committed.

checks.result: Official NHA Racing Calendar route exposes Season, Region, Date From, Date To, Issue, Races, Race, Last, and Results fields in captured text, but no June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were captured.
Official NHA Racing Index route was checked as a possible supporting source, but captured text did not expose complete June 2026 meeting rows.

Official 4Racing 2026 Fixtures route exposes the 2026 feature calendar and June venue/month entries for Turffontein and Fairview, but it does not expose exact meeting_date values needed for PR-130 C-rank records.
